videos.title: 2019 Lapham Loppet XC Freestyle and Classical Ski Race
tags: 2019 Lapham Loppet XC Freestyle and Classical Ski Race
videos.transcript:
but the weather did make for a perfect
backdrop for a cross-country skiing race
today at Lapham park in Delafield it's
so fun to be on the snow the 2019 Lapham
Lobeck got a little help from Mother
Nature soft mushy bass have real snow
the Lapham peak loop is just more than a
mile long and usually relies on man-made
snow to keep skiers going but the fresh
powder can also have a downside but the
fresh snow is pretty nice but I was kind
of struggling on some of the hills there
the skiers weren't just gliding along
today they were racing for some it's a
test of endurance I'm usually really
excited for a race I enjoy racing to see
how far I can push myself for others
it's a case of sibling rivalry just got
to beat my sister
make sure the race also serves as a
fundraiser for the park hoping to add
another half mile of trail in the woods
it's been a lot of years of working on
it but it's a wonderful thing now that
we've got it all I hope to get started
on the edition of that in the fall if
they raise 160 thousand dollars so some
perfect weather for the skiers today
Jessie

videos.title: 2009 City of Lakes Loppet (RaceDay)
videos.description: Video coverage of the 2009 City of Lakes Loppet from the Urban Paradise for North American Nordic Skiing, Minneapolis, Minnesota.  United States National Cross-Country Skiing Champion, 28 year old Caitlin Compton wins the Women's Race, while 25 year old Bjorn Batdorf of Minneapolis (formerly from Duluth, MN) sprinted past fellow Duluth native, Anders Osthus in the final 200 meters to claim his first Loppet Title.

videos.title: World Cup cross-country ski race canceled
videos.description:
A four-day skiing festival that would have brought athletes from around the world to Minneapolis has been canceled, with the organizers citing the health of the community as a reason. 

In a press release, John Munger, executive director of the Loppet Foundation said, "In keeping with updated information from the Minnesota Department of Health and after consulting with medical advisors, we are prioritizing the health and safety of our community, fans, athletes, staff and volunteers involved in these events."

videos.title: Johannes Hoesflot Klaebo books spot in sprint classic final | Winter Olympics 2026 | NBC Sports
videos.description:
Norwegian cross-country skiing legend Johannes Hoesflot Klaebo cruises to first place in the second semifinal of the men's sprint classic. American JC Schoonmaker finished in fourth, missing out on the final. #NBCSports #WinterOlympics #Skiing

videos.title: Skiing: NCAA Championships - Nordic Freestyle (3/6/19)
videos.description: Anna Bizyukova, Bill Harmeyer, Finn O'Connell and Lina Sutro earned All-American honors in the Nordic Freestyle races on day one of the 2019 NCAA Skiing Championships from Trapp Family Lodge in Stowe Wednesday. After the opening day of competition Vermont is in second place with 141 points, one behind Utah.

videos.title: Father Mouchet Loppet
videos.description: Easter weekend was the perfect time to hold the First Annual Father Mouchet Memorial Ski Loppet in Old Crow, Yukon. With a great turnout, community members strapping on skis for the first time in over 4 decades, and strong efforts put in from the youth- the weekend was a great success!!

videos.title: 2010 Golden Nordic Club's Huckleberry Loppet
videos.description: One of the hilights of the Nordic Skiing Season at Golden BC is the annual Huckleberry  Loppet Race.  This year it was the 14th annual,  and  was held on January 31 on the Dawn Mountain Trails at Kicking Horse Resort and attracted over 120 competitors of every age group. They  had a number of different categories from 1 km, to 20km and it was a perfect day with a little new snow coming down and temperatures hovering just below 0C.  Great day, and a great race.

videos.title: SYND 5-3-73 ANNUAL VASALOPPET SKI RACE IN SWEDEN
videos.description:
(5 Mar 1973) Worlds longest, annual, cross country ski race, the Vasaloppet, covers 53 miles (85 kilometers) between the towns Mora And Salen, in Sweden
